mapper.select: SELECT ri.id, ri.residence_id, ri.equipment_id, e.name AS equipment_name, e.category, ri.prepared, ri.storage_location, ri.disposition FROM residence_items ri INNER JOIN equipment e ON e.id = ri.equipment_id AND e.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ri.residence_id = #{residenceId} ORDER BY e.category, e.name

SELECT ri.id, ri.residence_id, ri.equipment_id, ri.prepared, ri.storage_location, ri.disposition FROM residence_items ri LEFT JOIN residences r ON r.id = ri.residence_id WHERE (r.status = 'checked_out' OR ri.residence_id IS NULL) AND ri.disposition = 'storage' ORDER BY ri.storage_location
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO residence_items (residence_id, equipment_id, prepared, quantity, storage_location, disposition) VALUES (#{residenceId}, #{equipmentId}, #{prepared}, #{quantity}, #{storageLocation}, #{disposition})

INSERT INTO residence_items (residence_id, equipment_id, prepared, quantity, storage_location, disposition) VALUES
(#{item.residenceId}, #{item.equipmentId}, #{item.prepared}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.storageLocation}, #{item.disposition})
mapper.update:
UPDATE residence_items SET prepared = CASE id
WHEN #{item.id} THEN IFNULL(#{item.prepared}, prepared)
ELSE prepared END, storage_location = CASE id
WHEN #{item.id} THEN #{item.storageLocation}
ELSE storage_location END, disposition = CASE id
WHEN #{item.id} THEN IFNULL(#{item.disposition}, disposition)
ELSE disposition END WHERE id IN
#{item.id}
